items.title: Solana outpaces Ethereum with 25.3B transactions – Will SOL/ETH finally react?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's transaction volume significantly surpassing Ethereum could enhance its competitive positioning and attract more liquidity to the SOL ecosystem.

items.title: Coinbase Flags Proof-of-Stake Chains Like Ethereum, Solana as Potential Quantum Risks
items.whyYouShouldCare: Coinbase's warning about quantum risks for proof-of-stake chains like Solana highlights potential vulnerabilities that could impact investor confidence and ecosystem stability.

items.title: Peter Thiel-backed unicorn Ramp rolls out $0 conversions between USDT and dollars across product suite
items.whyYouShouldCare: Ramp's introduction of zero-cost conversions between USDT and dollars may increase the usability of stablecoins within the Solana ecosystem, driving more transactions and liquidity.
